---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## DNS Record Type
If this relates to a specific DNS record type, which one?

## Gandi API Support
Have you checked that the [Gandi LiveDNS API](https://api.gandi.net/docs/livedns/) supports this?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples, or references.
